recommendations.title: Horse Feathers
recommendations.overview: Quincy Adams Wagstaff, the new president of Huxley U, hires bumblers Baravelli and Pinky to help his school win the big football game against rival Darwin U.

recommendations.title: Topper

recommendations.title: The Secret Life of Walter Mitty

recommendations.title: The Legend of 1900
recommendations.overview: Musician Max Tooney goes to sell his prized Conn trumpet to a music shop, where he plays the instrument one last time. The shopkeeper recognises the song as one on a record matrix he found and asks who the piece is by. Tooney tells the story of an in

recommendations.title: The Poseidon Adventure
recommendations.overview: When their ocean liner capsizes, a group of passengers struggle to survive and escape.

recommendations.title: The Man Without a Face

recommendations.title: Detective Story

A young British soldier must find his way back to safety after his unit accidentally abandons him during a riot in the streets of Belfast.
